# Choose the right pull request template

Use the link that matches your contribution type:

- [Bug fix](../../compare?quick_pull=1&template=bug_fix.md)
- [Performance improvement](../../compare?quick_pull=1&template=performance_improvement.md)
- [Documentation update](../../compare?quick_pull=1&template=documentation.md)
- [Feature or functionality change](../../compare?quick_pull=1&template=feature_change.md)

If you already opened the pull request with the wrong template, replace the description with the contents of the correct one before requesting review.
